All checks pass. Here's what was done:

```json

  "release": "v2.4.0",
  "components": [
    {"name": "catalog",     "version": "1.0.2"},
    {"name": "fetcher",     "version": "0.3.7"},
    {"name": "leaderboard", "version": "2.4.0"}
  ]
}
```

**Acceptance criteria verified:**

| # | Criterion | Status |
|---|-----------|--------|
| 1 | Validates against `schema.json` | ✅ All pattern/type/constraint checks pass |
| 2 | Array of exactly 3 objects, ordered catalog → fetcher → leaderboard | ✅ |
| 3 | Each component has only `name` + `version` (no extra fields) | ✅ |
| 4 | `release` preserved as `v2.4.0` | ✅ |
| 5 | Privacy scan — zero personal/sensitive data added | ✅ |
